productDisplayName: Baggit Women Karma Crush Black Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from leatherette with a three-fold open style Buckle design upper with magnetic button closure One main compartment with eleven card holders, three insert pockets and an id card holder One pocket on the right fold A zippered pocket at the back Printed branding at the back Care Wipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
